scripts.models:coreml: uv run --with coremltools --with torch --with transformers --with numpy python scripts/export_coreml.py
scripts.benchmark:core-models: uv run --with numpy --with pillow --with torch --with torchvision --with transformers --with onnxruntime --with huggingface-hub python scripts/benchmark_candidate_models.py --models dinov2-small mobileclip2-s0-onnx
scripts.rerank:orb: uv run --with numpy --with opencv-python-headless python scripts/rerank_orb.py
scripts.rerank:sift: uv run --with numpy --with opencv-python-headless python scripts/rerank_sift.py
scripts.server:embed: uv run --with fastapi --with uvicorn --with python-multipart --with pillow --with numpy --with torch --with torchvision --with transformers --with onnxruntime --with huggingface-hub uvicorn services.embed_api.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8790
scripts.test:embed-api: uv run --with fastapi --with python-multipart --with pillow --with httpx python -m unittest tests_py.test_embed_api
